subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that hath dawned from the horizon of utterance for those who have turned unto the Mighty, the Help in Peril. We make mention of the loved ones of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب اشرق من افق البیان لمن اقبل الی العزیز المستعان انا نذکر احباء الله
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
